title: Array Access
description: Initialize an array and print an element from a specific index using the [] operator.
problemStatement:
Fixed-length lists! Create an array `a` with five elements: `1, 2, 3, 4, 5`. Access the element at index `2` and print it.

**Requirement:** Access the element using `a[index]` syntax.
hints: Array indices start at 0, so index 2 is the 3rd element!
